codeReview.summary: Single-line addition of '| devin' to AgentType union in src/types.ts, inserted alphabetically between 'deepagents' and 'droid'. Minimal, correct change. grep confirms exactly 1 occurrence. The transient +1 type error (missing devin key in agents record) was expected and resolved by the subsequent devin-config feature. No tests needed for a pure type literal addition — behavioral tests are covered by devin-unit-tests.

summary: Clean, minimal type addition. Fulfills VAL-REG-001. No issues.
